questionHtml: Deduce the change in mitotic index after 72 hours compared to the control.
markschemeHtml:
0.3 / 100 % increase / doubling ✔

Do not penalize errors in significant figures. For example, 0.34 would be acceptable.

meta.title: Deduce the change in mitotic index after 72 hours compared to the control.
breadcrumbLabels: D2.1.17. Differences between tumours in rates of cell division and growth and in the capacity for metastasis and invasion of neighbouring tissue
